name: Rice Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the brown rice according to package instructions in vegetable broth instead of water.
2. In a bowl, mix together the cooked rice, spiced Italian tomatoes, chopped parsley, seasoned brown beans, and oyster mushrooms.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight if preparing ahead of time.
4. When ready to eat, reheat the mixture in a microwave for 3 minutes at high power. Serve hot.
